metadata.title: Nano Banana Pro - AI Image Generator & Editor | Marble AI
metadata.description: Nano Banana Pro by Google DeepMind. Sharper 2K imagery, intelligent 4K scaling, improved text rendering, and enhanced character consistency. Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image.

hero.title: Nano Banana Pro
hero.description: Google DeepMind's advanced image model. Sharper 2K imagery with intelligent 4K scaling, improved text rendering, and enhanced character consistency.

introduce.title: About Nano Banana Pro
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Google DeepMind's Nano Banana Pro delivers sharper 2K imagery, intelligent 4K scaling, improved text rendering, and enhanced character consistency for creative and API-driven workflows.

items.title: 2K Native Resolution
items.description: Generate sharp, detailed images at 2K resolution natively with exceptional clarity and fine details.

items.title: Intelligent 4K Scaling
items.description: Advanced upscaling technology that intelligently enhances images to 4K while preserving quality.

items.title: Enhanced Text Rendering
items.description: Improved text rendering with better accuracy, font reproduction, and natural placement.

items.title: Character Consistency
items.description: Enhanced character consistency across generations, perfect for storytelling and branding.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Nano Banana Pro a major leap in visual quality.

items.title: Dual Generation Modes
items.description: Supports both text-to-image generation and image-to-image editing for comprehensive creative workflows.

items.title: Superior Quality
items.description: Major leap in visual quality with sharper details, better colors, and more realistic textures.

items.title: API Optimized
items.description: Designed for API-driven workflows with reliable performance and consistent output quality.

items.title: Fast Processing
items.description: Optimized inference for quick generation without compromising the enhanced quality.

items.title: Style Control
items.description: Extensive style control options for diverse artistic directions and visual aesthetics.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated and edited images, suitable for business use.

use-cases.title: Use Cases
use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of Nano Banana Pro.

items.title: Professional Photography
items.description: Generate high-quality images for professional photography projects and commercial use.

items.title: Print Media
items.description: Create images suitable for print media with high resolution and sharp details.

items.title: Marketing Campaigns
items.description: Produce premium visual content for marketing campaigns and brand materials.

items.title: Digital Art
items.description: Create stunning digital artwork with enhanced quality and artistic control.

items.title: E-commerce
items.description: Generate product images with superior quality for online retail and catalogs.

items.title: Creative Projects
items.description: Power creative projects with high-quality visuals and consistent character designs.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about Nano Banana Pro.

items.title: What is Nano Banana Pro?
items.description: Nano Banana Pro is Google DeepMind's advanced image model delivering sharper 2K imagery, intelligent 4K scaling, and enhanced character consistency.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Nano Banana Pro supports both Text To Image (generating images from text descriptions) and Image To Image (editing and transforming existing images).

items.title: What resolution can it generate?
items.description: Nano Banana Pro natively generates 2K images with intelligent 4K upscaling available for even greater detail.

items.title: How does it differ from Nano Banana 2?
items.description: Nano Banana Pro offers enhanced quality with sharper 2K imagery, better text rendering, and improved character consistency compared to Nano Banana 2.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All images generated or edited with Nano Banana Pro through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: Is it suitable for print?
items.description: Yes! With native 2K resolution and intelligent 4K scaling, Nano Banana Pro produces images suitable for print media.

cta.title: Ready to Try Nano Banana Pro?
cta.description: Experience Google DeepMind's advanced image generation. Create stunning visuals with enhanced quality.
